deal.product_description: Google Pixel 10 (128GB) Android smartphone in this offer is the 2025 flagship-class Pixel with 128GB of onboard storage, provided as part of a bundle with a 12-month Mint Mobile Unlimited plan. The phone includes current-generation Pixel software features like advanced computational photography, tight Android integration, and Google services. The bundle lists the phone price as $300 when purchased with the required plan.
